title: Orae Oru Oorula Lyrics Orange Mittai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Orae Oru Oorula
Singer(s): Justin Prabhakaran & Vijay Sethupathi
Lyrics: Vijay Sethupathi,

Ore oru oorla
namma singa raja vaazhnduchan
paera sonna podhumey
andha oorey bayandhu nadunguchaam
singathuu odambu ippo sari illa
(he is serious)
kooti poga muyal onnu nari onnu
ambulance il yaaru
namma singa thaathava paaru

singamum nariyum
kutti sandai pottucham (ha ha ha ha)
adha theethu vaika
muyalum paada pattuchaam

singathoda nariyum nariyoda singamum
idayila muyalum, sema fight sema fight
singa nari nari singam
singa nari nari singam
singam singam singam
singam singam singam
singam singam Singam gethu
nari vethu
ippo singam laugh (ha ha ha ha ha)
namma singam laugh (haha ha ha ha ha)

seatil vandha singatha
parthu seriousnu doctor sonnarey
kooti vanda muyalam ippo
romba romba upset aayiruchey
(Sad, he is so sad)

hospital enaku venaa,
indha marundhu maathirayum enaku venaa
pozhachi irupen da thaana
naa yaarunu nenachey
myuyal payale dei
(what the hell you think about me?)
sir, sir, plz sonna kelunga, sir sir..
hei, singam da
ippo singam laugh (ha ha ha ha ha)
ore oru oorla namma singa raja vaazhnduchan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Orae Oru Oorula reflects the joy and unity of a community, celebrating the simple pleasures of life.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Orange Mittai, the song showcases the protagonist's lighthearted interactions with his surroundings, emphasizing friendship and fun.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Vijay Sethupathi and composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

When was the song released?

Orae Oru Oorula was released on August 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Orae Oru Oorula, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the essence of community and celebration. Set against the backdrop of Orange Mittai, it conveys a sense of joy and togetherness, inviting listeners to embrace the lighter side of life. The playful lyrics and upbeat melody evoke feelings of happiness and camaraderie, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. This track not only showcases Vijay Sethupathi's vocal talent but also highlights the infectious spirit of the film.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Orae Oru Oorula from Orange Mittai is a vibrant celebration of life, delivered with the unique flair of Vijay Sethupathi's vocals. This song captures the essence of joy and camaraderie, making it a perfect anthem for any festive occasion. With Justin Prabhakaran's catchy composition, it's a track that will surely uplift your spirits!
stanzaMeanings: In one town, our lion king has lived. Just saying his name makes the town scared. The lion's body is not okay now (he is serious). A rabbit and a dog are together in an ambulance; look at our lion's father.
The lion and the dog have started a little fight (ha ha ha ha). We sang to fix that.

The lion and the dog are in between, and the rabbit is also there. It's a big fight, a big fight. Lion, dog, dog, lion, lion, lion, lion, lion, lion, lion, lion, lion. The lion is laughing now (ha ha ha ha ha). Our lion is laughing (ha ha ha ha ha).
When the lion came to the seat, the doctor said he was serious. The rabbit came and is very, very upset now (Sad, he is so sad).

I don't want to go to the hospital; I don't want this medicine either. I am thinking about who I am. What the hell do you think about me? Sir, sir, please listen, sir, sir... Hey, lion, now the lion is laughing (ha ha ha ha ha).
In one town, our lion king has lived.
